      (by
        intro i
        exact hX1.supermartingale_of_submartingale)
    have hτ_le : ∀ x, τ x ≤ k := by
      intro ω
      by_contra h'
      exact hk ω (le_of_not_ge h')
    have := hmart.stoppedValue_min_ae_eq_condExp' (μ := P) hX2 hτ hσ hτ_le
    have h_eq :
        stoppedValue X (fun x ↦ min (τ x) (σ x)) =ᵐ[P]
          P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] := this
    have h_eq' :
        stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) =ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] := by
      simpa [inf_eq_min, min_comm] using h_eq
    exact h_eq'.le

classical
  by_cases hk : k = ⊥
  · subst hk
    have hτbot : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω = ⊥ := by
      filter_upwards [hτk] with ω hω
      exact le_bot_iff.1 (le_trans hω bot_le)
    have hτσbot : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, (τ ⊓ σ) ω = ⊥ := by
      filter_upwards [hτbot] with ω hω
      simp [hω]
    have hst0 : stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) =ᵐ[P] fun ω => X ⊥ ω := by
      filter_upwards [hτσbot] with ω hω
      simp [stoppedValue, hω]
    have hstτ0 : stoppedValue X τ =ᵐ[P] fun ω => X ⊥ ω := by
      filter_upwards [hτbot] with ω hω
      simp [stoppedValue, hω]
    refine (hst0.trans_le ?_)
    have : P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] =ᵐ[P] fun ω => X ⊥ ω := by
      refine (condExp_congr_ae hstτ0).trans ?_
      simpa using (condExp_of_stronglyMeasurable hσ.measurableSpace_le
        (Measurable.stronglyMeasurable (hX1.adapted.measurable ⊥))
        (hX1.integrable ⊥))
    exact this.symm.le
  ·
    haveI : OrderBot (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : LinearOrder (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : TopologicalSpace (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : OrderTopology (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : SecondCountableTopology (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : MeasurableSpace (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : BorelSpace (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance
    haveI : MetrizableSpace (Set.Iic k) := by infer_instance

    let τ' : Ω → WithTop (Set.Iic k) :=
      fun ω => τ ω |>.map (fun i => ⟨i, le_trans (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_ne (by
        have : i ≤ k := by
          by_contra hi
          exact hk (le_antisymm bot_le (by
            have : (⊥ : ι) ≤ i := bot_le
            exact le_trans this (le_of_not_ge hi)))
        exact this) (by
        intro h; cases h)))))
    have hτ' : IsStoppingTime (𝓕.comap (fun (i : Set.Iic k) => (i : ι))) τ' := by
      simpa [τ', Filtration.comap, IsStoppingTime] using hτ
    have hσ' : IsStoppingTime (𝓕.comap (fun (i : Set.Iic k) => (i : ι))) (fun ω => σ ω) := by
      simpa [Filtration.comap, IsStoppingTime] using hσ
    have hX' : Submartingale (fun (i : Set.Iic k) => X (i : ι)) (𝓕.comap (fun i => (i : ι))) P := by
      exact hX1.comp_tsubtype (fun i : Set.Iic k => (i : ι))
    have hX'RC : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (fun i : Set.Iic k => X (i : ι) ω) := by
      intro ω
      simpa using (hX2 ω).comp (fun i : Set.Iic k => (i : ι))
    have hτ'k : ∀ ω, τ ω ≤ (↑k : WithTop ι) := by
      intro ω
      by_contra hle
      exact hk rfl
    have hτk' : ∀ ω, τ' ω ≤ (↑(⟨k, le_rfl⟩ : Set.Iic k) : WithTop (Set.Iic k)) := by
      intro ω
      simp [τ']
    have hτk'' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ (↑k : WithTop ι) := by
      simpa using hτk
    have hτk''' : ∀ ω, τ ω ≤ (↑k : WithTop ι) := by
      intro ω
      by_contra hle
      exact hk rfl
    have hτk₀ : ∀ ω, τ ω ≤ (↑k : WithTop ι) := by
      intro ω
      classical
      by_cases hω : τ ω ≤ (↑k : WithTop ι)
      · exact hω
      · exact (hτk''.ae_eq_of_subset (by intro ω hω; exact False.elim (hω hω))).elim
    have : stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) ≤ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] :=
      Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (E := E) (Ω := Ω) (𝓕 := 𝓕) (X := X)
        (σ := σ) (τ := τ) hX1 (k := 0) (by
          simpa using hτk) hσ hτ
    exact this

classical
  by_cases hk : k = ⊥
  · subst hk
    have hτbot : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω = ⊥ := by
      filter_upwards [hτk] with ω hω
      exact le_bot_iff.1 hω
    have hτσbot : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, (τ ⊓ σ) ω = ⊥ := by
      filter_upwards [hτbot] with ω hω
      simp [hω]
    have hst : stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ X ⊥ ω := by
      filter_upwards [hτσbot] with ω hω
      simp [stoppedValue, hω]
    have hstτ : stoppedValue X τ =ᵐ[P] fun ω ↦ X ⊥ ω := by
      filter_upwards [hτbot] with ω hω
      simp [stoppedValue, hω]
    refine (hst.mono ?_)
    intro ω hω
    have hce : P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] ω = X ⊥ ω := by
      have : P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] =ᵐ[P] P[fun ω ↦ X ⊥ ω|hσ.measurableSpace] :=
        condExp_congr_ae hstτ
      have : P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] ω =
          P[fun ω ↦ X ⊥ ω|hσ.measurableSpace] ω := (this.eq_of_nhdsWithin ?_ : _)
      · simpa [this] using (condExp_const (μ := P) (m := hσ.measurableSpace) (c := (0 : E))).trans ?_
      · exact trivial
    simpa [hω, hce]
  · have hτk' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ (k : ι) := hτk
    have hk' : (↑k : WithTop ι) = (k : ι) := rfl
    have hτk'' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ (k : ι) := hτk'
    simpa using hX1.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (𝓕 := 𝓕) (k := k) (τ := τ) (σ := σ)
      (hτk := by simpa using hτk'') (hσ := hσ) (hτ := hτ)

classical
  have hτk' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι) := by
    simpa using hτk
  have hσk : ∀ ω, (σ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι) := by
    intro ω; exact inf_le_right
  have hσ' : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (σ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) :=
    hσ.min (isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 k)
  have hτ' : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (τ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) :=
    hτ.min (isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 k)
  have hmain :
      stoppedValue X ((τ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) ⊓ (σ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι))) ≤ᵐ[P]
        P[stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) | hσ'.measurableSpace] := by
    simpa [inf_assoc, inf_left_comm, inf_comm] using
      (Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (E := E) (Ω := Ω) (𝓕 := 𝓕.toNatFiltration)
        (X := fun n ω ↦ X (n : ι) ω) (P := P)
        (hX := hX1.toNatSubmartingale hX2) (k := (Nat.cast k))
        (hτk := (hτk'.mono fun ω hω ↦ by simpa using hω))
        (hσ := hσ'.toNat) (hτ := hτ'.toNat))
  have hcond :
      P[stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) | hσ'.measurableSpace] =ᵐ[P]
        P[stoppedValue X τ | hσ.measurableSpace] := by
    have h1 :
        stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ fun _ : Ω ↦ (k : WithTop ι)) =ᵐ[P] stoppedValue X τ := by
      filter_upwards [hτk'] with ω hω
      simp [stoppedValue, inf_eq_left.2 hω]
    refine (condExp_congr_ae h1).trans ?_
    refine condExp_of_stronglyMeasurable hσ.measurableSpace_le ?_
      (hX1.integrable_stoppedValue_of_le_const τ hτ (fun ω ↦ le_trans (le_of_eq (by rfl)) (hτk' ω)))
    · exact (measurable_stoppedValue (hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2) hτ).stronglyMeasurable
  refine (hmain.trans ?_).trans_eq (hcond.symm)
  filter_upwards [hτk'] with ω hω
  simp [stoppedValue, inf_assoc, inf_left_comm, inf_comm, inf_eq_left.2 hω]

classical
  by_cases hPk : IsFiniteMeasure P
  · have := Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (E := E) (𝓕 := 𝓕)
      (X := X) (P := P) (σ := σ) (τ := τ) (hX := hX1) (k := k) hτk hσ hτ
    simpa using this
  · have hPinf : ¬ IsFiniteMeasure P := hPk
    have : (stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) : Ω → E) ≤ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] := by
      have : (stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) : Ω → E) =ᵐ[P] 0 := by
        simpa [ae_iff] using (ae_all_iff.2 (fun ω => by simp))
      have : (stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) : Ω → E) ≤ᵐ[P] 0 := by
        filter_upwards [this] with ω hω
        simp [hω]
      have h0 : (0 : Ω → E) ≤ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] := by
        filter_upwards [] with ω
        simp
      exact this.trans h0
    simpa using this

classical
  have hk : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, (τ ⊓ σ) ω ≤ k := by
    filter_upwards [hτk] with ω hω
    exact le_trans (min_le_left _ _) hω
  simpa [min_comm, inf_eq_min] using
    (Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (Ω := Ω) (E := E) (mΩ := mΩ) (P := P)
      (X := fun n : ℕ ↦ X (k := k) (i := k) (by exact (⊥ : ι)) ) (𝓕 := (fun _ ↦ 𝓕))
      (hX := by
        simpa using hX1) (k := 0) (hτk := by
        simpa using hk) (hσ := hσ) (hτ := hτ))

classical
  refine ae_of_all _ ?_
  intro ω
  by_cases hω : τ ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι)
  · have hle : τ ω ⊓ σ ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι) := le_trans (inf_le_left) hω
    have hτk' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι) := by
      exact (hτk.mono fun ω hω => hω)
    have hτk'' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, (τ ⊓ σ) ω ≤ (k : WithTop ι) := by
      exact hτk'.mono fun ω hω => le_trans (inf_le_left) hω
    have hnat :=
      Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (Ω := Ω) (E := E) (mΩ := mΩ) (P := P)
        (X := fun n => X n) (σ := σ) (τ := τ) (𝓕 := (fun n => 𝓕 n)) hX1
        (k := (0 : ℕ)) (hτk := by
          simpa using (hτk''.mono fun ω hω => le_trans hω (le_top : (k : WithTop ι) ≤ ⊤)))
        hσ hτ
    simpa using (hnat ω)
  · have : stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) ω = stoppedValue X τ ω := by
      simp [stoppedValue, inf_eq_left.2 (le_of_not_ge hω)]
    simp [this]

classical
  have hτk' : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, (τ ⊓ σ) ω ≤ k := by
    filter_upwards [hτk] with ω hω
    exact le_trans (min_le_left _ _) hω
  simpa [stoppedValue, inf_eq_min] using
    (Submartingale.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_nat (Ω := Ω) (E := E) (mΩ := mΩ) (P := P)
      (X := fun n : ℕ => X (OrderBot.bot)) (σ := σ) (τ := τ) (𝓕 := (fun _ => 𝓕))
      (hX := by
        simpa using hX1.comp_tendsto (f := fun _ : ℕ => (OrderBot.bot : ι)) (by
          intro i j hij; exact le_rfl))
      (k := 0) (hτk := by simpa using hτk') hσ hτ)

classical
  by_cases hPk : IsFiniteMeasure P
  · letI : IsFiniteMeasure P := hPk
    have hτk' : ∀ ω, τ ω ≤ k := by
      intro ω
      by_contra hle
      have : ¬ (∀ᵐ ω ∂P, τ ω ≤ k) := by
        refine not_eventually.mpr ?_
        refine ⟨ω, ?_⟩
        simpa [hle] using (show ¬ τ ω ≤ k from hle)
      exact this hτk
    have hmart : Martingale X 𝓕 P := hX1.martingale_of_isClosedBall ?_ ?_
    ·
      have := hmart.stoppedValue_min_ae_eq_condExp' (μ := P) (hRC := hX2) hτ hσ hτk'
      have hEq :
          stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) =ᵐ[P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace] := by
        simpa [inf_comm, inf_assoc, inf_left_comm, min_comm] using this
      exact hEq.le
    ·
      intro i
      exact (hX1.integrable i)
    ·
      intro i
      exact isClosedBall
  ·
    have hnull : P = 0 := by
      classical
      by_contra hne
      exact hPk (isFiniteMeasure_of_isProbabilityMeasure (μ := P))
    subst hnull
    simpa using (eventuallyEq_of_eq (by ext ω; simp)).le
